name: Peanut Butter and Milk Chocolate Jumbles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Reese's creamy or Crunchy peanut butter
Hershey's milk chocolate bars, 2 (7 oz each), cut into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, beat together butter, peanut butter and sugar until well blended. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well. Stir together flour, baking soda and salt; gradually add to butter mixture, beating until blended. Stir in candy pieces. Drop by rounded teaspoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly; remove from cookie sheet to a wire rack. Cool completely. About 4-1/2 dozen cookies.
